description: Creates a 1D number line with configurable range and tick marks for visualizing intervals, inequalities, and single-variable concepts.
utility: Create a 1D number line container for intervals and single-variable visualization

arguments.name: position
arguments.description: Logical position using at(row, col) coordinates on the canvas grid

arguments.name: height
arguments.description: Height in logical row units (typically small, e.g., 6)

arguments.name: range
arguments.description: Value range displayed on the number line with optional tick step

arguments.name: grid
arguments.description: Show tick marks on the number line

alternates.syntax: nl(at(row, col), height, width, range(min, max))
alternates.description: Number line with specified range, no tick marks

alternates.syntax: nl(at(row, col), height, width, range(min, max), grid())
alternates.description: Number line with tick marks shown

alternates.syntax: nl(at(row, col), height, width, range(min, max, step), grid())
alternates.description: Number line with custom tick spacing

alternates.syntax: nl(at(row, col), height, width, range(min, max), grid(), br(0.5))

examples.scenario: Basic number line from 0 to 10 with tick marks
Number line with an interval marked
examples.expression:
nl_1 = nl(at(3,9), 6, 19.4, range(0, 10), grid())
interval_1 = interval(nl_1, 2, 6, type(closed), buff(-19))
